Appearances:

Plaintiff Turk Street Apartment is present. Represented by Jeff Jurow
Attorney David Wasserman appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Isela Ramos and Rosa Ramos are present.
Attorneys Chandra Russell and Aviva Gilbert representing the defendants full scope.
Court Interpreter Marta Riesen is present assiting the Defendants Isela Ramos and Rosa Ramos tranlate Spanish into English and English into Spanish.

The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of April 20, 2015 remains on calendar.
